question_intent: Average goals against per game for teams that had a goalie with at least 100 minutes played in a game and were coached by a coach who won the Jack Adams award

plan.question_intent: Average goals against per game for teams that had a goalie with at least 100 minutes played in a game and were coached by a coach who won the Jack Adams award
plan.detail_query:
SELECT t.name AS team_name, g.playerid AS goalie_id, g.min AS minutes_played, c.coachid AS coach_id, a.award AS coach_award, g.ga AS goals_against, g.gp AS games_played, (g.ga / g.gp) AS ga_per_game
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (g.min >= 100) AND (a.award = 'Jack Adams')
GROUP BY t.name, g.playerid, g.min, c.coachid, a.award, g.ga, g.gp
HAVING (g.ga / g.gp) > 0

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga / g.gp) AS avg_ga_per_game
join_clauses: JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid

JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid

SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (g.min >= 100)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (g.min >= 100) AND (a.award = 'Jack Adams')
LIMIT 5

SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga / g.gp) AS avg_ga_per_game
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (g.min >= 100) AND (a.award = 'Jack Adams')
GROUP BY t.name
HAVING (AVG(g.ga / g.gp) > 0)

SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga / g.gp) AS avg_ga_per_game
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (g.min >= 100) AND (a.award = 'Jack Adams')
GROUP BY t.name
HAVING (AVG(g.ga / g.gp) > 0)

build_logs.notes: Calculate the average of the average goals against per game from the leaf block

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga / g.gp) AS avg_ga_per_game
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (g.min >= 100) AND (a.award = 'Jack Adams')
GROUP BY t.name
HAVING (AVG(g.ga / g.gp) > 0)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(avg_ga_per_game) AS final_avg_ga_per_game
FROM (SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga / g.gp) AS avg_ga_per_game
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (g.min >= 100) AND (a.award = 'Jack Adams')
GROUP BY t.name
HAVING (AVG(g.ga / g.gp) > 0)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(avg_goals_against) AS final_avg_goals_against
FROM (SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga) AS avg_goals_against
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (t.confid = ab.code) AND (ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (a.award = 'Jack Adams')
GROUP BY t.name) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average of the average goals allowed per game across all NHL teams that had at least 100 minutes of play and were coached by a Jack Adams Award winner, considering only teams with a positive average goals allowed per game?
